title: Diving into a Science Fiction House

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Science fiction stories ______ detailed, imaginative settings.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Science fiction stories create detailed, imaginative settings."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Using 'less' and 'fewer' correctly helps describe amounts.

Future technology can have advanced roles in daily life.
questions.correct_answer: Future technology can have advanced roles in daily life.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Future technology can have advanced roles in daily life." is one of the key things to remember.
